edges.evidence_quote: The Texas Syndicate was established at Folsom State Prison in California in 1978 in direct response to the other California prison gangs, notably the Aryan Brotherhood and Mexican Mafia, which were attempting to prey on native Texas inmates.
edges.context: Texas Syndicate was formed in response to Mexican Mafia preying on Texas inmates, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: The Texas Syndicate was established at Folsom State Prison in California in 1978 in direct response to the other California prison gangs, notably the Aryan Brotherhood and Mexican Mafia, which were attempting to prey on native Texas inmates.

edges.evidence_quote: Gang members have a direct working relationship with associates and/or members of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.context: Texas Syndicate has a direct working relationship with Gulf Cartel, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: Syndicate members have been known to carry out contract killings for Los Zetas.
edges.context: Texas Syndicate members perform contract killings for Los Zetas, indicating cooperation.
